title: THE SEED
overview: AR Team is trapped in enemy territory, and must break an encirclement to deliver valuable data back to base. But the enemy numbers are vast, and there's only a few of them…

title: WAKE UP
overview: A new commander arrives at the forward base, and is quickly sent into battle. But a high-priority mission comes in before she even has a chance to get her feet wet.

title: THE ECHO
overview: M4A1 is trapped behind enemy lines with a deadly Sangvis Executioner after her. But even with Griffin T-Doll teams nearby, she's still reluctant to turn to them for help...

title: SILENCE 01
overview: The mission to recover the other missing members of AR Team begins. They recover SOPII, but she quickly clashes with her new commander.

title: SILENCE 02
overview: A tense standoff during the attempt to rescue AR15 is interrupted when the Sangvis troops go out of control and start shooting each other.

title: THE MESSAGE 01
overview: M4A1 continues her search for M16. But the members of 404 are after her as well, and they don't have good intentions…

title: THE MESSAGE 02
overview: AR Team tracks down Intruder, the Sangvis T-Doll commander. But Intruder is a commander-type, and has more than a few tricks up her sleeve…

title: THE KINDLING 01
overview: Griffin's commanders are summoned to an emergency meeting at a secret HQ after the discovery of a piece of secret Sangvis data.

title: THE KINDLING 02
overview: AR Team goes on the hunt for Destroyer, the Ringleader behind the attack on the secret HQ. But something's wrong with AR15…

title: THE KINDLING 03
overview: AR15 is now a fugitive, hunted by both Griffin and Sangvis. The rest of AR Team wants to hunt for her, but Griffin has other plans for them.

title: COMET 01
overview: Squad Negev is assigned to help find the missing AR15. But they're cut off by Sangvis and trapped.

title: COMET 02
overview: As the Sangvis Mastermind throws hordes of T-Dolls at Griffin in an attempt to capture M4A1, AR15 prepares herself to make one last sacrifice for her friends.
